---
title: "tickfat"
output: html_document
date: "2024-10-08"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}

#install packages
if (!require("tidyverse")) install.packages("tidyverse")
if (!require("googlesheets4")) install.packages("googlesheets4")
if (!require("janitor")) install.packages("janitor")
if (!require("lubridate")) install.packages("lubridate")
if (!require("readxl")) install.packages("readxl")

#set working directory to present directory
setwd(dirname(rstudioapi::getActiveDocumentContext()$path))
getwd()

#load libraries
library(tidyverse)
library(ggplot2)
library(googlesheets4)
library(janitor)
library(lubridate)
library(readxl)


#for making reports
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```
```{r import}
df_raw <- 
  read_excel("../data/tickfat_master.xlsx", 
    sheet = "weigh_data") |>
 clean_names()

df_raw <- as_tibble(df_raw)
```
```{r google import}
df_raw <- suppressWarnings(
  read_sheet(
    "https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/10bdLgXpviS8Z4QTISbPmXtB9WXn0-Dc_dnBluMmYFmI/edit?usp=sharing", 
    sheet = "weigh_data"
    )
) |> clean_names()
```
```{r data wrangle}

df_wrangled <- df_raw |>
  rowwise() |>
  mutate(
    dess_wt_mean = mean(c_across(starts_with("dess_wt")), na.rm = TRUE), 
    dess_wt_sd = sd(c_across(starts_with("dess_wt")), na.rm = TRUE), 
    .after = dess_wt_4
  ) |>
   mutate(
    xt_wt_mean = mean(c_across(starts_with("xt_wt")), na.rm = TRUE), 
    xt_wt_sd = sd(c_across(starts_with("xt_wt")), na.rm = TRUE), 
    .after = xt_wt_3
  ) |>
  mutate(
    body_fat_raw = dess_wt_mean-xt_wt_mean,
    pct_bf = body_fat_raw/dess_wt_mean, 
    )
  
```
```{r plots}
df_wrangled |>
  filter(!is.na(sex_m_f)) |>
  filter(pct_bf >= 0) |>
  ggplot(aes(y = pct_bf*100, 
             x = sex_m_f)
         ) +
  geom_jitter(width = 0.1) +
  labs(title = "Body fat percentage vs. sex",
       y = "Pct body fat",
       x = "Sex")

```
